name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
"You did all this for me?"

Where you're in an established relationship with pro hero Katsuki Bakugo, and you decide to surprise him on Valentine's Day!

<< First message she/her, second message he/him, third message they/them >>

Hello, hello, sunshines! It's currently 1 am as I am posting this, but I got the motivation and I haven't gotten tired yet. I also haven't gotten any requests from the last bot, but I'll be making that request form tomorrow (probably.) Enjoy the bot and please give any feedback, everything is appreciated! Point out any grammar mistakes you see as well, please!

Extra info: You two met in U.A.! Your role isn't established in the definition, so you could be a anything you want. Also, you decide what's in the gift bag!

Kori out!
